name: techwerker
description: Unofficial local Codex helper for Tech Week planning, RSVP queues, repeated Partiful fields, and local RSVP state.

interface.shortDescription: Plan Tech Week and work RSVP queues safely
interface.longDescription: Unofficial local Codex helper for Tech Week attendees on Codex for Mac. Techwerker helps Codex collect reusable non-secret RSVP basics once, understand plain-English event requests, build waitlist-aware and location-aware RSVP portfolios, open official Tech Week/Partiful pages, fill repeated form fields, click scoped RSVP/list controls after event-specific authorization, and stop for credentials, one-time codes, payment, captchas, unknown factual answers, or ambiguous confirmations. Not affiliated with Tech Week, a16z, Partiful, or event hosts.
defaultPrompt: Use Techwerker. What can you do?
Get started with New York Tech Week.
Find me a cool AI event on Tuesday afternoon near Williamsburg.
Find me an ElevenLabs AI hackathon near SoHo.
Yes, get me on the list for that one.
Make me a realistic Tech Week day plan.
